allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('expo:', d['version']\); print\('rn peer:', d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\).get\('react-native','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('react-native installed:', d['version']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['screen','safe','navigation','gesture']\)]")
